channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-08 07:57 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Excited to launch our brand new photo editor. Now available on iOS, with Android coming soon. Lots o...
item.description: Excited to launch our brand new photo editor. Now available on iOS, with Android coming soon. Lots of good quality of life updates and more improvements to come.

item.title: @elonmusk: My favorite image so far. Orion, built by human hands in just a few years, set against a moment bill...
item.description: My favorite image so far. Orion, built by human hands in just a few years, set against a moment billions of years in the making.

item.title: @elonmusk: Yesterday, four astronauts on Artemis II traveled farther than any humans in history. Thanks to@NASA...
item.description: Yesterday, four astronauts on Artemis II traveled farther than any humans in history. Thanks to@NASAand incredible American ingenuity. 🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: My 18-month investigation into Sam Altman and OpenAI in@NewYorker, with@andrewmarantz, is out now. R...
item.description: My 18-month investigation into Sam Altman and OpenAI in@NewYorker, with@andrewmarantz, is out now. Read here:newyorker.com/magazine/2026/…Thread on a few of the key findings here:xcancel.com/RonanFarrow/status/204…

item.title: @elonmusk: “I think that the California high-speed rail nightmare is the probably quintessential example of gov...
item.description: “I think that the California high-speed rail nightmare is the probably quintessential example of government waste and mismanagement,” says Rep. Vince Fong, a Republican whose district sits in California’s Central Valley, through which the project is supposed to run.cbsn.ws/41kxw9k

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD Supervised can see & react faster than you
item.description: FSD Supervised can see & react faster than you

item.title: @elonmusk: I'm thrilled to join@xAIand@SpaceX! After many years at Google DeepMind working on Gemini (including...
item.description: I'm thrilled to join@xAIand@SpaceX! After many years at Google DeepMind working on Gemini (including co-founding and launching Gemini Diffusion at Google I/O and contributing to Gemini, Gemma, AlphaCode, and Waymo), I can't wait to see what we build together. Few places turn science fiction into reality this fast. We're forging Grok into the most capable assistant yet, making physical intelligence real, and taking it all to Space. The last few years have been intense, but what's ahead is on another level. No better time to build — we can watch from the sidelines or be part of it. DMs are open. Understand the Universe 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: One day, we will be out there, among the stars
item.description: One day, we will be out there, among the stars

item.title: @elonmusk: Headline: "Elon Musk's X receives a 24,000 euro fine for distributing a rape video of a Flemish woma...
item.description: Headline: "Elon Musk's X receives a 24,000 euro fine for distributing a rape video of a Flemish woman" Reality: Elon Musk didn't own the company in 2020 Belgian media is intentionally conflating current ownership with the failures of the previous regime. They’re trying to taint Elon and 𝕏’s reputation over an incident from a completely different era Notice how they explicitly use "Elon Musk" and "𝕏" image instead of the old management? Timeline for the "reporters" in the back: - 2020: The incident happened - 2021: The video was finally removed via a judge's order - 2022: Elon Musk bought Twitter This is straight-up targeted hate disguised as news Pre-Elon 𝕏 operated completely differently and that broken system is exactly why he bought the platform and rebuilt it entirely This is the dark side of the fraud media that no one talks about..

item.title: @elonmusk: ALS is a disease that takes everything. Our goal is to give something back. Kenneth, who has been lo...
item.description: ALS is a disease that takes everything. Our goal is to give something back. Kenneth, who has been losing his ability to move and speak due to ALS, is exploring how Neuralink’s brain-computer interface technology can help translate neural signals into life-changing impact.

item.title: @elonmusk: Kardaschev II or we're not a serious civilization
item.description: Kardaschev II or we're not a serious civilization

item.title: @elonmusk: Marc Andreessen thinks Elon Musk hasn't just built successful companies, he might have actually crac...
item.description: Marc Andreessen thinks Elon Musk hasn't just built successful companies, he might have actually cracked the code on how to manage for the next hundred years. The fundamental problem with any traditional organization that has multiple layers of management is what Andreessen brilliantly describes as "compounding lies." Every layer distorts reality just a little bit more until the original mission is completely lost in the bureaucracy. Musk’s method completely destroys that outdated corporate structure. It relies entirely on an extreme focus on substance and getting straight to the truth. By stripping away the noise, he has figured out the exact blueprint to reconcile being a chaotic fountain of ideas with being a ruthless, systematic builder.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Kardashev Scale is one of the coolest ways to think about how advanced a civilization really is ...
item.description: The Kardashev Scale is one of the coolest ways to think about how advanced a civilization really is Here is the cool visualization fromTerafab.aiThe Kardashev Scale: - Type 1: Harness all the energy on a planet - Type 2: Harness all the energy from a star - Type 3: Harness all the energy in a galaxy The Kardashev Scale is not just sci-fi. It shows us the long-term destiny of intelligent life…if we don’t destroy ourselves first

item.title: @elonmusk: History will be divided into two eras: Before Starship and After We are about to witness a 100x incr...
item.description: History will be divided into two eras: Before Starship and After We are about to witness a 100x increase in civilizational power

item.title: @elonmusk: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on Elon Musk "Elon Musk's ability to will future technologies into existenc...
item.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on Elon Musk "Elon Musk's ability to will future technologies into existence is “unparalleled"
